description: The complete report of one autonomous remediation run (src/body/self_healing/remediation_models.py). RemediationResult is the full audit→fix→validate evidence trail. Three sibling types are declared in the same file and referenced as field types: MatchedPattern (finding + pattern + confidence + risk_level), FixDetail (finding_id + file_path + action_handler + status + duration_ms + error_message), and RemediationMode enum (SAFE_ONLY/MEDIUM_RISK/ALL_DETERMINISTIC). VOCABULARY DRIFT: MatchedPattern.risk_level and FixDetail.status are bare str with comment-documented value sets — not enums. findings_by_severity keys are AuditSeverity enum value names as bare str. These are noted as reconciliation candidates. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this remediation session.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the remediation run started.

total_findings.description: Total number of audit findings at the start of this run.

findings_by_severity.description: Count of findings keyed by severity name. Keys are AuditSeverity enum value names (bare str) — vocabulary reconciliation pending.

matched_patterns.description: List of MatchedPattern — findings that matched an AutoFixablePattern with sufficient confidence.

unmatched_findings.description: List of AuditFinding — findings with no matching AutoFixablePattern.

fixes_attempted.description: Number of fixes attempted in this run.

fixes_succeeded.description: Number of fixes that completed successfully.

fixes_failed.description: Number of fixes that failed or were skipped.

validation_passed.description: True if the post-fix validation audit showed improvement.

findings_before.description: Total finding count before fixes were applied.

findings_after.description: Total finding count after fixes were applied.

improvement_delta.description: findings_before - findings_after. Positive = improvement. Negative = regression.

fix_details.description: List of FixDetail — per-fix execution records for the evidence trail.

duration_sec.description: Total remediation run duration in seconds.

audit_input_path.description: Path to the audit input used for this run.

remediation_output_path.description: Path to the remediation output artifact.

validation_audit_path.description: Path to the post-fix validation audit (str | None). None if validation was not run.
